description: A recloser on a distribution feeder operates, indicating a fault. The system must automatically analyze the fault data and locate the issue.

nodes.task_description: Receive fault data (current, voltage) from the operated recloser.

expected_outcome.value: System ingests the fault data from the SCADA system.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the fault data to calculate the distance to the fault from the substation.

expected_outcome.value: System calculates the fault is approximately 2.5 miles down the feeder.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific line segment on the GIS map corresponding to the calculated distance.

expected_outcome.value: System highlights the faulted segment between two specific poles.
